## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run pack:check`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Compatibility and docs

- [ ] README updated if install, config, or compatibility changed
- [ ] changelog updated when needed
- [ ] platform docs or shared vectors reviewed if protocol behavior changed

## Notes

- risks, follow-up items, or anything intentionally left out
